title.en: Assessment of LNPCPs for submucosal invasion

statement.en: ESGE recommends use of the algorithm shown in Fig. 1 and summarized below to risk assess LNPCPs for submucosal invasion (SMI) prior to EMR.

text.en: Endoscopic imaging features suggesting low risk superficial SMI (en bloc endoscopic resection) or deep SMI (surgery).

Any bulky (Is, IIa+Is with nodule > 10 mm) lesion in the rectum or at the rectosigmoid junction (high risk for covert SMI) without endoscopic imaging features suggesting overt SMI (en bloc endoscopic resection).

commentary.en: In general, risk of SMI is the only evidence-based factor that should prompt a decision for en bloc resection in place of piecemeal EMR.
